trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

gaming.insight: Gaming content is a significant trend, accounting for 30% of the total trending videos. This suggests a robust interest in gaming-related content, driven by both major releases and unique challenges.

examples: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
SPIDER-MAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Easter Eggs & Details You Missed!

superhero_and_film.insight: Superhero content, particularly focused on Spider-Man, is another dominant genre, highlighting the continued appeal of superhero narratives and detailed analysis of trailers.

japanese_content.example: 『チェンソーマン 刺客篇』ティザーPV②／Chainsaw Man – Assassins Arc Official Trailer 2
japanese_content.insight: Japanese anime content is making an impact on global trends, indicating opportunities for more cross-cultural content.

MAPPA_CHANNEL.insight: MAPPA CHANNEL's presence with anime content suggests a niche but strong influence in the trending space.

New Rockstars.insight: New Rockstars' focus on detailed breakdowns shows a demand for in-depth content analysis, particularly in popular media.

opportunity_in_gaming.insight: With gaming content trending significantly, there's an opportunity for creators to delve into more diverse gaming genres or emerging games to capture audience interest.

cross-cultural_content.insight: The trending of Japanese anime content indicates potential in exploring or localizing international content for broader audiences.

detailed_analysis.insight: The popularity of breakdown videos suggests a market opportunity for more detailed, analytical content across various genres, not just limited to films and trailers.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
